lore:quest.name: The Silent Village
lore:quest.description: Havenbrook, Elderfall's sister village to the southwest, has sent no trader in a month. Walk its gate and its well and learn what silence means on the hill circuit. An ambush waits at the well — go armed.
steps: Accept the quest from Captain Roderic Hale.
Investigate Havenbrook Well — and survive what wears the militia's coats.
The quest completes automatically at the well.
